pages.title: Problem: "Can't transition from BUILDING to SIMULATING"
pages.text: $(bold)Possible causes$(): $(li)No faces configured (all faces DISABLED) $(li)No Importers/Exporters linked $(li)CM block not upgraded to PreFab$(br2)$(bold)Solution$(): $(li)Configure at least one PULL or PUSH face $(li)Link faces to Importers/Exporters

pages.title: Problem: "PreFab immediately enters HALTED after SIMULATING"
pages.text: $(bold)Possible causes$(): $(li)Input chest was emptied during simulation $(li)Output chest filled up during simulation $(li)No chests adjacent to PreFab faces$(br2)$(bold)Solution$(): $(li)Stock input chests before CACHED mode $(li)Use larger output chests (barrels, storage drawers)

pages.title: Problem: "Production very slow in CACHED"
pages.text: $(bold)Not a problem.$() This is expected if: $(li)Factory is slow (low rate measured during SIMULATING) $(li)Example: 0.05 items/tick = 1 item per second$(br2)$(bold)Solution$(): Add more machines or speed upgrades, then re-simulate

pages.title: Problem: "F3 screen shows chunks still loaded in CACHED"
pages.text: $(bold)Possible causes$(): $(li)CM dimension is loaded for another reason (player inside, other CM active) $(li)Check specific CM room code chunks$(br2)$(bold)Verification$(): $(li)Note chunk count before CACHED $(li)Enter CACHED $(li)Check chunk count after (should be lower)$(br2)---
